description: Panel discussion on the future of decentralized finance (DeFi) featuring insights from industry leaders. Topics include governance, scaling solutions, and composability across blockchains. [t=20:00] The panelists introduce themselves and share their backgrounds in finance and blockchain technology. [t=110:00] They discuss the importance of scaling and the implications for DeFi applications.
topic_summary: Exploration of the future of DeFi, focusing on governance, scaling challenges, and the role of composability in multi-chain environments. Panelists share their perspectives on the evolution of decentralized finance and the technological advancements needed to support growth.
